tEn: Adding Conditional Control to Text-to-Image Diffusion Models
tZh: 向文本到图像扩散模型添加条件控制
sEn: ControlNet adds spatial conditioning controls to pretrained text-to-image diffusion models via zero convolutions.
sZh: ControlNet通过零卷积为预训练的文本到图像扩散模型添加空间条件控制。
absEn: We present ControlNet, a neural network architecture to add spatial conditioning controls to large, pretrained text-to-image diffusion models. ControlNet locks the production-ready large diffusion models, and reuses their deep and robust encoding layers pretrained with billions of images as a strong backbone to learn a diverse set of conditional controls. The neural architecture is connected with "zero convolutions" (zero-initialized convolution layers) that progressively grow the parameters from zero and ensure that no harmful noise could affect the finetuning. We test various conditioning controls, eg, edges, depth, segmentation, human pose, etc, with Stable Diffusion, using single or multiple conditions, with or without prompts. We show that the training of ControlNets is robust with small (<50k) and large (>1m) datasets. Extensive results show that ControlNet may facilitate wider applications to control image diffusion models.
absZh: 我们提出了ControlNet，一种神经网络架构，用于向大型预训练文本到图像扩散模型添加空间条件控制。ControlNet锁定生产就绪的大型扩散模型，并重用其经过数十亿图像预训练的深度且稳健的编码层作为强大骨干，以学习多样化的条件控制。该神经架构通过“零卷积”（零初始化的卷积层）连接，这些层从零开始逐步增长参数，确保不会引入有害噪声影响微调。我们使用Stable Diffusion测试了各种条件控制，例如边缘、深度、分割、人体姿态等，使用单个或多个条件，带或不带提示。我们展示了ControlNet的训练对于小数据集（<50k）和大数据集（>1m）都是稳健的。大量结果表明，ControlNet可能促进控制图像扩散模型的更广泛应用。

contrib.en: Proposes ControlNet, a neural network architecture for adding spatial conditioning controls to large pretrained text-to-image diffusion models.
contrib.zh: 提出ControlNet，一种向大型预训练文本到图像扩散模型添加空间条件控制的神经网络架构。

contrib.en: Uses zero-initialized convolution layers to connect trainable and locked copies, preventing harmful noise during finetuning.
contrib.zh: 使用零初始化卷积层连接可训练副本和锁定副本，防止微调期间的有害噪声。

contrib.en: Demonstrates robust training with datasets ranging from <50k to >1m samples, avoiding overfitting and catastrophic forgetting.
contrib.zh: 展示了在小于5万到大于100万样本的数据集上的稳健训练，避免了过拟合和灾难性遗忘。

contrib.en: Supports diverse conditioning inputs (edges, depth, segmentation, human pose) with single or multiple conditions, with or without prompts.
contrib.zh: 支持多种条件输入（边缘、深度、分割、人体姿态），可单条件或多条件，带或不带提示。

contrib.en: Achieves competitive results with industrial models using limited resources (single GPU, 200k samples) for depth-to-image tasks.
contrib.zh: 在深度到图像任务中，使用有限资源（单GPU、20万样本）达到与工业模型竞争的结果。

contrib.en: Enables composition of multiple ControlNets without extra weighting, facilitating complex conditional control.
contrib.zh: 支持多个ControlNet的组合而无需额外加权，便于复杂条件控制。

limits.en: ControlNet requires a pretrained diffusion model (e.g., Stable Diffusion) as backbone, limiting applicability to other architectures.
limits.zh: ControlNet需要预训练扩散模型（如Stable Diffusion）作为骨干，限制了在其他架构上的适用性。

limits.en: Training ControlNet for new conditions requires task-specific datasets, which may be small and hard to collect.
limits.zh: 为新条件训练ControlNet需要特定任务数据集，可能规模小且难以收集。

limits.en: The sudden convergence phenomenon may cause abrupt learning, potentially missing gradual improvements.
limits.zh: 突然收敛现象可能导致学习突变，可能错过渐进改进。

limits.en: ControlNet's performance depends on the quality of conditioning inputs; noisy or inaccurate inputs degrade results.
limits.zh: ControlNet的性能依赖于条件输入的质量；噪声或不准确的输入会降低结果。

limits.en: The method has been tested primarily on Stable Diffusion; generalization to other diffusion models is not fully validated.
limits.zh: 该方法主要在Stable Diffusion上测试，对其他扩散模型的泛化性尚未充分验证。

items.en: We present ControlNet, a neural network architecture to add spatial conditioning controls to large, pretrained text-to-image diffusion models. ControlNet locks the production-ready large diffusion models, and reuses their deep and robust encoding layers pretrained with billions of images as a strong backbone to learn a diverse set of conditional controls. The neural architecture is connected with “zero convolutions” (zero-initialized convolution layers) that progressively grow the parameters from zero and ensure that no harmful noise could affect the finetuning. We test various conditioning controls, e.g., edges, depth, segmentation, human pose, etc., with Stable Diffusion, using single or multiple conditions, with or without prompts. We show that the training of ControlNets is robust with small (<<50k) and large (>>1m) datasets. Extensive results show that ControlNet may facilitate wider applications to control image diffusion models.
items.zh: 我们提出了ControlNet，一种神经网络架构，用于向大型预训练文本到图像扩散模型添加空间条件控制。ControlNet锁定生产就绪的大型扩散模型，并重用其经过数十亿图像预训练的深度且稳健的编码层作为强大骨干，以学习多样化的条件控制。该神经架构通过“零卷积”（零初始化的卷积层）连接，这些层从零开始逐步增长参数，确保不会产生有害噪声影响微调。我们使用Stable Diffusion测试了各种条件控制，例如边缘、深度、分割、人体姿态等，采用单一或多个条件，带或不带提示。结果表明，ControlNet的训练在小型（<<50k）和大型（>>1m）数据集上均具有鲁棒性。大量实验显示，ControlNet可能促进图像扩散模型控制的更广泛应用。

items.en: Many of us have experienced flashes of visual inspiration that we wish to capture in a unique image. With the advent of text-to-image diffusion models [54, 62, 72], we can now create visually stunning images by typing in a text prompt. Yet, text-to-image models are limited in the control they provide over the spatial composition of the image; precisely expressing complex layouts, poses, shapes and forms can be difficult via text prompts alone. Generating an image that accurately matches our mental imagery often requires numerous trial-and-error cycles of editing a prompt, inspecting the resulting images and then re-editing the prompt.
items.zh: 我们中的许多人都曾经历过视觉灵感的闪现，希望将其捕捉到独特的图像中。随着文本到图像扩散模型[54, 62, 72]的出现，我们现在可以通过输入文本提示创建视觉上令人惊叹的图像。然而，文本到图像模型在控制图像空间构图方面提供的控制有限；仅通过文本提示精确表达复杂的布局、姿态、形状和形式可能很困难。生成与我们心理意象准确匹配的图像通常需要多次试错循环：编辑提示、检查生成的图像，然后重新编辑提示。

items.en: Can we enable finer grained spatial control by letting users provide additional images that directly specify their desired image composition? In computer vision and machine learning, these additional images (e.g., edge maps, human pose skeletons, segmentation maps, depth, normals, etc.) are often treated as conditioning on the image generation process. Image-to-image translation models [34, 98] learn the mapping from conditioning images to target images. The research community has also taken steps to control text-to-image models with spatial masks [6, 20], image editing instructions [10], personalization via finetuning [21, 75], etc. While a few problems (e.g., generating image variations, inpainting) can be resolved with training-free techniques like constraining the denoising diffusion process or editing attention layer activations, a wider variety of problems like depth-to-image, pose-to-image, etc., require end-to-end learning and data-driven solutions.
items.zh: 我们能否通过让用户提供额外的图像直接指定其期望的图像构图，从而实现更精细的空间控制？在计算机视觉和机器学习中，这些额外的图像（例如边缘图、人体姿态骨架、分割图、深度、法线等）通常被视为对图像生成过程的条件。图像到图像翻译模型[34, 98]学习从条件图像到目标图像的映射。研究社区也采取了步骤，通过空间掩码[6, 20]、图像编辑指令[10]、通过微调进行个性化[21, 75]等来控制文本到图像模型。虽然少数问题（例如生成图像变体、修复）可以通过无训练技术（如约束去噪扩散过程或编辑注意力层激活）解决，但更广泛的问题（如深度到图像、姿态到图像等）需要端到端学习和数据驱动的解决方案。

items.en: Learning conditional controls for large text-to-image diffusion models in an end-to-end way is challenging. The amount of training data for a specific condition may be significantly smaller than the data available for general text-to-image training. For instance, the largest datasets for various specific problems (e.g., object shape/normal, human pose extraction, etc.) are usually about 100K in size, which is 50,000 times smaller than the LAION-5B [79] dataset that was used to train Stable Diffusion [82]. The direct finetuning or continued training of a large pretrained model with limited data may cause overfitting and catastrophic forgetting [31, 75]. Researchers have shown that such forgetting can be alleviated by restricting the number or rank of trainable parameters [14, 25, 31, 92]. For our problem, designing deeper or more customized neural architectures might be necessary for handling in-the-wild conditioning images with complex shapes and diverse high-level semantics.
items.zh: 以端到端方式学习大型文本到图像扩散模型的条件控制具有挑战性。特定条件的训练数据量可能远小于通用文本到图像训练可用的数据量。例如，各种特定问题（如物体形状/法线、人体姿态提取等）的最大数据集通常约为100K大小，比用于训练Stable Diffusion的LAION-5B [79]数据集小50,000倍。直接微调或继续训练大型预训练模型，使用有限数据可能导致过拟合和灾难性遗忘[31, 75]。研究人员表明，通过限制可训练参数的数量或秩可以缓解这种遗忘[14, 25, 31, 92]。对于我们的问题，设计更深或更定制的神经架构可能是处理具有复杂形状和多样高层语义的野外条件图像所必需的。

items.en: This paper presents ControlNet, an end-to-end neural network architecture that learns conditional controls for large pretrained text-to-image diffusion models (Stable Diffusion in our implementation). ControlNet preserves the quality and capabilities of the large model by locking its parameters, and also making a trainable copy of its encoding layers. This architecture treats the large pretrained model as a strong backbone for learning diverse conditional controls. The trainable copy and the original, locked model are connected with zero convolution layers, with weights initialized to zeros so that they progressively grow during the training. This architecture ensures that harmful noise is not added to the deep features of the large diffusion model at the beginning of training, and protects the large-scale pretrained backbone in the trainable copy from being damaged by such noise.
items.zh: 本文提出了ControlNet，一种端到端神经网络架构，用于学习大型预训练文本到图像扩散模型（在我们的实现中为Stable Diffusion）的条件控制。ControlNet通过锁定其参数来保留大型模型的质量和能力，同时制作其编码层的可训练副本。该架构将大型预训练模型视为学习多样化条件控制的强大骨干。可训练副本和原始锁定模型通过零卷积层连接，权重初始化为零，以便在训练过程中逐步增长。这种架构确保在训练开始时不会向大型扩散模型的深层特征添加有害噪声，并保护可训练副本中的大规模预训练骨干免受此类噪声的损害。

items.en: Our experiments show that ControlNet can control Stable Diffusion with various conditioning inputs, including Canny edges, Hough lines, user scribbles, human key points, segmentation maps, shape normals, depths, etc. (Figure 1). We test our approach using a single conditioning image, with or without text prompts, and we demonstrate how our approach supports the composition of multiple conditions. Additionally, we report that the training of ControlNet is robust and scalable on datasets of different sizes, and that for some tasks like depth-to-image conditioning, training ControlNets on a single NVIDIA RTX 3090Ti GPU can achieve results competitive with industrial models trained on large computation clusters. Finally, we conduct ablative studies to investigate the contribution of each component of our model, and compare our models to several strong conditional image generation baselines with user studies.
items.zh: 我们的实验表明，ControlNet可以使用各种条件输入控制Stable Diffusion，包括Canny边缘、霍夫线、用户涂鸦、人体关键点、分割图、形状法线、深度等（图1）。我们使用单一条件图像（带或不带文本提示）测试了我们的方法，并展示了我们的方法如何支持多个条件的组合。此外，我们报告了ControlNet的训练在不同大小的数据集上具有鲁棒性和可扩展性，并且对于某些任务（如深度到图像条件），在单个NVIDIA RTX 3090Ti GPU上训练ControlNet可以达到与在大型计算集群上训练的工业模型相竞争的结果。最后，我们进行了消融研究，以调查模型每个组件的贡献，并通过用户研究将我们的模型与几个强大的条件图像生成基线进行了比较。

items.en: In summary, (1) we propose ControlNet, a neural network architecture that can add spatially localized input conditions to a pretrained text-to-image diffusion model via efficient finetuning, (2) we present pretrained ControlNets to control Stable Diffusion, conditioned on Canny edges, Hough lines, user scribbles, human key points, segmentation maps, shape normals, depths, and cartoon line drawings, and (3) we validate the method with ablative experiments comparing to several alternative architectures, and conduct user studies focused on several previous baselines across different tasks.
items.zh: 总结来说：(1) 我们提出了ControlNet，一种神经网络架构，可以通过高效微调向预训练的文本到图像扩散模型添加空间局部输入条件；(2) 我们提供了预训练的ControlNet来控制Stable Diffusion，条件包括Canny边缘、霍夫线、用户涂鸦、人体关键点、分割图、形状法线、深度和卡通线条画；(3) 我们通过消融实验验证了该方法，并与几种替代架构进行了比较，并在不同任务上针对几个先前基线进行了用户研究。

items.en: One way to finetune a neural network is to directly continue training it with the additional training data. But this approach can lead to overfitting, mode collapse, and catastrophic forgetting. Extensive research has focused on developing finetuning strategies that avoid such issues.
items.zh: 微调神经网络的一种方法是直接使用额外的训练数据继续训练。但这种方法可能导致过拟合、模式崩溃和灾难性遗忘。大量研究集中在开发避免这些问题的微调策略上。

items.en: HyperNetwork is an approach that originated in the Natural Language Processing (NLP) community [25], with the aim of training a small recurrent neural network to influence the weights of a larger one. It has been applied to image generation with generative adversarial networks (GANs) [4, 18]. Heathen et al. [26] and Kurumuz [43] implement HyperNetworks for Stable Diffusion [72] to change the artistic style of its output images.
items.zh: HyperNetwork是一种起源于自然语言处理（NLP）社区的方法[25]，旨在训练一个小型循环神经网络来影响较大网络的权重。它已被应用于使用生成对抗网络（GAN）的图像生成[4, 18]。Heathen等人[26]和Kurumuz[43]为Stable Diffusion [72]实现了HyperNetwork，以改变其输出图像的艺术风格。

items.en: Adapter methods are widely used in NLP for customizing a pretrained transformer model to other tasks by embedding new module layers into it [30, 84]. In computer vision, adapters are used for incremental learning [74] and domain adaptation [70]. This technique is often used with CLIP [66] for transferring pretrained backbone models to different tasks [23, 66, 85, 94]. More recently, adapters have yielded successful results in vision transformers [49, 50] and ViT-Adapter [14]. In concurrent work with ours, T2I-Adapter [56] adapts Stable Diffusion to external conditions.
items.zh: 适配器方法广泛用于NLP，通过将新的模块层嵌入到预训练的Transformer模型中，将其定制到其他任务[30, 84]。在计算机视觉中，适配器用于增量学习[74]和领域适应[70]。该技术常与CLIP [66]一起使用，将预训练骨干模型迁移到不同任务[23, 66, 85, 94]。最近，适配器在视觉Transformer [49, 50]和ViT-Adapter [14]中取得了成功结果。在与我们同时进行的工作中，T2I-Adapter [56]将Stable Diffusion适配到外部条件。

items.en: Additive Learning circumvents forgetting by freezing the original model weights and adding a small number of new parameters using learned weight masks [51, 74], pruning [52], or hard attention [80]. Side-Tuning [92] uses a side branch model to learn extra functionality by linearly blending the outputs of a frozen model and an added network, with a predefined blending weight schedule.
items.zh: 加法学习通过冻结原始模型权重并使用学习到的权重掩码[51, 74]、剪枝[52]或硬注意力[80]添加少量新参数来规避遗忘。Side-Tuning [92]使用侧分支模型，通过线性混合冻结模型和添加网络的输出来学习额外功能，并采用预定义的混合权重调度。

items.en: Low-Rank Adaptation (LoRA) prevents catastrophic forgetting [31] by learning the offset of parameters with low-rank matrices, based on the observation that many over-parameterized models reside in a low intrinsic dimension subspace [2, 47].
items.zh: 低秩适应（LoRA）通过使用低秩矩阵学习参数的偏移来防止灾难性遗忘[31]，基于许多过参数化模型位于低内在维度子空间的观察[2, 47]。

items.en: Zero-Initialized Layers are used by ControlNet for connecting network blocks. Research on neural networks has extensively discussed the initialization and manipulation of network weights [36, 37, 44, 45, 46, 76, 83, 95]. For example, Gaussian initialization of weights can be less risky than initializing with zeros [1]. More recently, Nichol et al. [59] discussed how to scale the initial weight of convolution layers in a diffusion model to improve the training, and their implementation of “zero_module” is an extreme case to scale weights to zero. Stability’s model cards [83] also mention the use of zero weights in neural layers. Manipulating the initial convolution weights is also discussed in ProGAN [36], StyleGAN [37], and Noise2Noise [46].
items.zh: 零初始化层被ControlNet用于连接网络块。关于神经网络的研究广泛讨论了网络权重的初始化和操作[36, 37, 44, 45, 46, 76, 83, 95]。例如，高斯初始化权重可能比零初始化风险更小[1]。最近，Nichol等人[59]讨论了如何缩放扩散模型中卷积层的初始权重以改进训练，他们的“zero_module”实现是将权重缩放到零的极端情况。Stability的模型卡[83]也提到了在神经层中使用零权重。操作初始卷积权重也在ProGAN [36]、StyleGAN [37]和Noise2Noise [46]中讨论过。

items.en: Image Diffusion Models were first introduced by Sohl-Dickstein et al. [81] and have been recently applied to image generation [17, 42]. The Latent Diffusion Models (LDM) [72] performs the diffusion steps in the latent image space [19], which reduces the computation cost. Text-to-image diffusion models achieve state-of-the-art image generation results by encoding text inputs into latent vectors via pretrained language models like CLIP [66]. Glide [58] is a text-guided diffusion model supporting image generation and editing. Disco Diffusion [5] processes text prompts with clip guidance. Stable Diffusion [82] is a large-scale implementation of latent diffusion [72]. Imagen [78] directly diffuses pixels using a pyramid structure without using latent images. Commercial products include DALL-E2 [62] and Midjourney [54].
items.zh: 图像扩散模型最初由Sohl-Dickstein等人[81]引入，最近已应用于图像生成[17, 42]。潜在扩散模型（LDM）[72]在潜在图像空间[19]中执行扩散步骤，从而降低了计算成本。文本到图像扩散模型通过预训练语言模型（如CLIP [66]）将文本输入编码为潜在向量，实现了最先进的图像生成结果。Glide [58]是一种支持图像生成和编辑的文本引导扩散模型。Disco Diffusion [5]使用CLIP引导处理文本提示。Stable Diffusion [82]是潜在扩散[72]的大规模实现。Imagen [78]直接使用金字塔结构扩散像素，而不使用潜在图像。商业产品包括DALL-E2 [62]和Midjourney [54]。

items.en: Controlling Image Diffusion Models facilitate personalization, customization, or task-specific image generation. The image diffusion process directly provides some control over color variation [53] and inpainting [67, 7]. Text-guided control methods focus on adjusting prompts, manipulating CLIP features, and modifying cross-attention [7, 10, 20, 27, 40, 41, 58, 64, 67]. MakeAScene [20] encodes segmentation masks into tokens to control image generation. SpaText [6] maps segmentation masks into localized token embeddings. GLIGEN [48] learns new parameters in attention layers of diffusion models for grounded generating. Textual Inversion [21] and DreamBooth [75] can personalize content in the generated image by finetuning the image diffusion model using a small set of user-provided example images. Prompt-based image editing [10, 33, 86] provides practical tools to manipulate images with prompts. Voynov et al. [88] propose an optimization method that fits the diffusion process with sketches. Concurrent works [8, 9, 32, 56] examine a wide variety of ways to control diffusion models.
items.zh: 控制图像扩散模型有助于个性化、定制或任务特定的图像生成。图像扩散过程直接提供对颜色变化[53]和修复[67, 7]的一些控制。文本引导的控制方法侧重于调整提示、操作CLIP特征和修改交叉注意力[7, 10, 20, 27, 40, 41, 58, 64, 67]。MakeAScene [20]将分割掩码编码为令牌以控制图像生成。SpaText [6]将分割掩码映射为局部令牌嵌入。GLIGEN [48]在扩散模型的注意力层中学习新参数以进行接地生成。Textual Inversion [21]和DreamBooth [75]可以通过使用少量用户提供的示例图像微调图像扩散模型来个性化生成图像中的内容。基于提示的图像编辑[10, 33, 86]提供了使用提示操作图像的实用工具。Voynov等人[88]提出了一种优化方法，使扩散过程与草图拟合。同时进行的工作[8, 9, 32, 56]研究了控制扩散模型的各种方式。

items.en: Conditional GANs [15, 34, 63, 90, 93, 97, 98, 99] and transformers [13, 19, 68] can learn the mapping between different image domains, e.g., Taming Transformer [19] is a vision transformer approach; Palette [77] is a conditional diffusion model trained from scratch; PITI [89] is a pretraining-based conditional diffusion model for image-to-image translation. Manipulating pretrained GANs can handle specific image-to-image tasks, e.g., StyleGANs can be controlled by extra encoders [71], with more applications studied in [3, 22, 38, 39, 55, 60, 65, 71].
items.zh: 条件GAN [15, 34, 63, 90, 93, 97, 98, 99]和Transformer [13, 19, 68]可以学习不同图像域之间的映射，例如Taming Transformer [19]是一种视觉Transformer方法；Palette [77]是一种从头开始训练的条件扩散模型；PITI [89]是一种基于预训练的条件扩散模型，用于图像到图像翻译。操作预训练GAN可以处理特定的图像到图像任务，例如StyleGAN可以通过额外的编码器[71]进行控制，更多应用在[3, 22, 38, 39, 55, 60, 65, 71]中研究。

items.capEn: Figure 2: A neural block takes a feature map x𝑥x as input and outputs another feature map y𝑦y, as shown in (a). To add a ControlNet to such a block we lock the original block and create a trainable copy and connect them together using zero convolution layers, i.e., 1×1111\times 1 convolution with both weight and bias initialized to zero. Here c𝑐c is a conditioning vector that we wish to add to the network, as shown in (b).
items.capZh: 图2：一个神经块以特征图x作为输入，输出另一个特征图y，如(a)所示。为了向这样的块添加ControlNet，我们锁定原始块并创建一个可训练副本，然后使用零卷积层（即权重和偏置均初始化为零的1×1卷积）将它们连接起来。这里c是我们希望添加到网络的条件向量，如(b)所示。

items.en: ControlNet is a neural network architecture that can enhance large pretrained text-to-image diffusion models with spatially localized, task-specific image conditions. We first introduce the basic structure of a ControlNet in Section 3.1 and then describe how we apply a ControlNet to the image diffusion model Stable Diffusion [72] in Section 3.2. We elaborate on our training in Section 3.3 and detail several extra considerations during inference such as composing multiple ControlNets in Section 3.4.
items.zh: ControlNet是一种神经网络架构，可以增强大型预训练文本到图像扩散模型，使其具有空间局部、任务特定的图像条件。我们首先在第3.1节介绍ControlNet的基本结构，然后在第3.2节描述如何将ControlNet应用于图像扩散模型Stable Diffusion [72]。我们在第3.3节详细说明训练过程，并在第3.4节详细说明推理过程中的一些额外考虑，例如组合多个ControlNet。

items.en: ControlNet injects additional conditions into the blocks of a neural network (Figure 2). Herein, we use the term network block to refer to a set of neural layers that are commonly put together to form a single unit of a neural network, e.g., resnet block, conv-bn-relu block, multi-head attention block, transformer block, etc. Suppose ℱ​(⋅;Θ)ℱ⋅Θ\mathcal{F}(\cdot;\Theta) is such a trained neural block, with parameters ΘΘ\Theta, that transforms an input feature map 𝒙𝒙\bm{x}, into another feature map 𝒚𝒚\bm{y} as
items.zh: ControlNet将额外条件注入神经网络的块中（图2）。在此，我们使用术语“网络块”指代通常组合在一起形成神经网络单个单元的一组神经层，例如resnet块、conv-bn-relu块、多头注意力块、Transformer块等。假设ℱ(·;Θ)是一个训练好的神经块，参数为Θ，将输入特征图x转换为另一个特征图y，如下所示：

items.en: In our setting, 𝒙𝒙\bm{x} and 𝒚𝒚\bm{y} are usually 2D feature maps, i.e., 𝒙∈ℝh×w×c𝒙superscriptℝℎ𝑤𝑐\bm{x}\in\mathbb{R}^{h\times w\times c} with {h,w,c}ℎ𝑤𝑐\{h,w,c\} as the height, width, and number of channels in the map, respectively (Figure 2a).
items.zh: 在我们的设置中，x和y通常是2D特征图，即x∈ℝ^{h×w×c}，其中{h,w,c}分别表示高度、宽度和通道数（图2a）。

items.en: To add a ControlNet to such a pre-trained neural block, we lock (freeze) the parameters ΘΘ\Theta of the original block and simultaneously clone the block to a trainable copy with parameters ΘcsubscriptΘc\Theta_{\text{c}} (Figure 2b). The trainable copy takes an external conditioning vector 𝒄𝒄\bm{c} as input. When this structure is applied to large models like Stable Diffusion, the locked parameters preserve the production-ready model trained with billions of images, while the trainable copy reuses such large-scale pretrained model to establish a deep, robust, and strong backbone for handling diverse input conditions.
items.zh: 为了将ControlNet添加到这样的预训练神经块中，我们锁定（冻结）原始块的参数Θ，同时将块克隆到一个可训练的副本，参数为Θc（图2b）。可训练副本将外部条件向量c作为输入。当此结构应用于像Stable Diffusion这样的大型模型时，锁定的参数保留了使用数十亿图像训练的、可投入生产的模型，而可训练副本则重用这种大规模预训练模型，为处理多样化的输入条件建立了一个深度、稳健且强大的骨干网络。

items.en: The trainable copy is connected to the locked model with zero convolution layers, denoted 𝒵​(⋅;⋅)𝒵⋅⋅\mathcal{Z}(\cdot;\cdot). Specifically, 𝒵​(⋅;⋅)𝒵⋅⋅\mathcal{Z}(\cdot;\cdot) is a 1×1111\times 1 convolution layer with both weight and bias initialized to zeros. To build up a ControlNet, we use two instances of zero convolutions with parameters Θz1subscriptΘz1\Theta_{\text{z1}} and Θz2subscriptΘz2\Theta_{\text{z2}} respectively. The complete ControlNet then computes
items.zh: 可训练副本通过零卷积层（记为Z(·;·)）与锁定模型连接。具体来说，Z(·;·)是一个1×1卷积层，其权重和偏置均初始化为零。为了构建ControlNet，我们使用两个零卷积实例，参数分别为Θz1和Θz2。完整的ControlNet计算如下：

items.en: where 𝒚csubscript𝒚c\bm{y}_{\text{c}} is the output of the ControlNet block. In the first training step, since both the weight and bias parameters of a zero convolution layer are initialized to zero, both of the 𝒵​(⋅;⋅)𝒵⋅⋅\mathcal{Z}(\cdot;\cdot) terms in Equation (2) evaluate to zero, and
items.zh: 其中yc是ControlNet块的输出。在第一个训练步骤中，由于零卷积层的权重和偏置参数都初始化为零，方程(2)中的两个Z(·;·)项都为零，因此：

items.en: In this way, harmful noise cannot influence the hidden states of the neural network layers in the trainable copy when the training starts. Moreover, since 𝒵​(𝒄;Θz1)=𝟎𝒵𝒄subscriptΘz10\mathcal{Z}(\bm{c};\Theta_{\text{z1}})=\bm{0} and the trainable copy also receives the input image 𝒙𝒙\bm{x}, the trainable copy is fully functional and retains the capabilities of the large, pretrained model allowing it to serve as a strong backbone for further learning. Zero convolutions protect this backbone by eliminating random noise as gradients in the initial training steps. We detail the gradient calculation for zero convolutions in supplementary materials.
items.zh: 这样，在训练开始时，有害噪声不会影响可训练副本中神经网络层的隐藏状态。此外，由于Z(c;Θz1)=0且可训练副本也接收输入图像x，可训练副本功能完整，并保留了大型预训练模型的能力，使其能够作为进一步学习的强大骨干。零卷积通过消除初始训练步骤中梯度中的随机噪声来保护这个骨干。我们在补充材料中详细介绍了零卷积的梯度计算。

items.capEn: Figure 3: Stable Diffusion’s U-net architecture connected with a ControlNet on the encoder blocks and middle block. The locked, gray blocks show the structure of Stable Diffusion V1.5 (or V2.1, as they use the same U-net architecture). The trainable blue blocks and the white zero convolution layers are added to build a ControlNet.
items.capZh: 图3：Stable Diffusion的U-net架构，在编码器块和中间块上连接了ControlNet。锁定的灰色块显示了Stable Diffusion V1.5（或V2.1，因为它们使用相同的U-net架构）的结构。可训练的蓝色块和白色零卷积层被添加以构建ControlNet。

full.secZh: 3.2 用于文本到图像扩散的ControlNet

items.en: We use Stable Diffusion [72] as an example to show how ControlNet can add conditional control to a large pretrained diffusion model. Stable Diffusion is essentially a U-Net [73] with an encoder, a middle block, and a skip-connected decoder. Both the encoder and decoder contain 12 blocks, and the full model contains 25 blocks, including the middle block. Of the 25 blocks, 8 blocks are down-sampling or up-sampling convolution layers, while the other 17 blocks are main blocks that each contain 4 resnet layers and 2 Vision Transformers (ViTs). Each ViT contains several cross-attention and self-attention mechanisms. For example, in Figure 3a, the “SD Encoder Block A” contains 4 resnet layers and 2 ViTs, while the “×3absent3\times 3” indicates that this block is repeated three times. Text prompts are encoded using the CLIP text encoder [66], and diffusion timesteps are encoded with a time encoder using positional encoding.
items.zh: 我们以Stable Diffusion [72]为例，展示ControlNet如何为大型预训练扩散模型添加条件控制。Stable Diffusion本质上是一个U-Net [73]，包含编码器、中间块和跳跃连接的解码器。编码器和解码器各有12个块，整个模型包含25个块（包括中间块）。在这25个块中，8个是下采样或上采样卷积层，其余17个是主块，每个主块包含4个resnet层和2个视觉Transformer（ViT）。每个ViT包含多个交叉注意力和自注意力机制。例如，在图3a中，“SD编码器块A”包含4个resnet层和2个ViT，而“×3”表示该块重复三次。文本提示使用CLIP文本编码器[66]编码，扩散时间步使用位置编码的时间编码器编码。

items.en: The ControlNet structure is applied to each encoder level of the U-net (Figure 3b). In particular, we use ControlNet to create a trainable copy of the 12 encoding blocks and 1 middle block of Stable Diffusion. The 12 encoding blocks are in 4 resolutions (64×64,32×32,16×16,8×86464323216168864\times 64,32\times 32,16\times 16,8\times 8) with each one replicated 3 times. The outputs are added to the 12 skip-connections and 1 middle block of the U-net. Since Stable Diffusion is a typical U-net structure, this ControlNet architecture is likely to be applicable with other models.
items.zh: ControlNet结构应用于U-net的每个编码器级别（图3b）。具体来说，我们使用ControlNet创建Stable Diffusion的12个编码块和1个中间块的可训练副本。这12个编码块分布在4个分辨率（64×64、32×32、16×16、8×8）上，每个分辨率重复3次。输出被添加到U-net的12个跳跃连接和1个中间块。由于Stable Diffusion是典型的U-net结构，这种ControlNet架构很可能也适用于其他模型。

items.en: The way we connect the ControlNet is computationally efficient — since the locked copy parameters are frozen, no gradient computation is required in the originally locked encoder for the finetuning. This approach speeds up training and saves GPU memory. As tested on a single NVIDIA A100 PCIE 40GB, optimizing Stable Diffusion with ControlNet requires only about 23% more GPU memory and 34% more time in each training iteration, compared to optimizing Stable Diffusion without ControlNet.
items.zh: 我们连接ControlNet的方式计算效率高——由于锁定副本的参数被冻结，在微调过程中，原始锁定的编码器不需要计算梯度。这种方法加速了训练并节省了GPU内存。在单个NVIDIA A100 PCIE 40GB上测试，与优化没有ControlNet的Stable Diffusion相比，优化带有ControlNet的Stable Diffusion每个训练迭代仅需要多约23%的GPU内存和34%的时间。

items.en: Image diffusion models learn to progressively denoise images and generate samples from the training domain. The denoising process can occur in pixel space or in a latent space encoded from training data. Stable Diffusion uses latent images as the training domain as working in this space has been shown to stabilize the training process [72]. Specifically, Stable Diffusion uses a pre-processing method similar to VQ-GAN [19] to convert 512×512512512512\times 512 pixel-space images into smaller 64×64646464\times 64 latent images. To add ControlNet to Stable Diffusion, we first convert each input conditioning image (e.g., edge, pose, depth, etc.) from an input size of 512×512512512512\times 512 into a 64×64646464\times 64 feature space vector that matches the size of Stable Diffusion. In particular, we use a tiny network ℰ​(⋅)ℰ⋅\mathcal{E}(\cdot) of four convolution layers with 4×4444\times 4 kernels and 2×2222\times 2 strides (activated by ReLU, using 16, 32, 64, 128, channels respectively, initialized with Gaussian weights and trained jointly with the full model) to encode an image-space condition 𝒄isubscript𝒄i\bm{c}_{\text{i}} into a feature space conditioning vector 𝒄fsubscript𝒄f\bm{c}_{\text{f}} as,
items.zh: 图像扩散模型学习逐步去噪图像，并从训练域生成样本。去噪过程可以在像素空间或从训练数据编码的潜在空间中进行。Stable Diffusion使用潜在图像作为训练域，因为在这个空间工作已被证明可以稳定训练过程[72]。具体来说，Stable Diffusion使用类似于VQ-GAN [19]的预处理方法，将512×512像素空间图像转换为更小的64×64潜在图像。为了将ControlNet添加到Stable Diffusion，我们首先将每个输入条件图像（例如，边缘、姿态、深度等）从512×512的输入大小转换为与Stable Diffusion大小匹配的64×64特征空间向量。具体来说，我们使用一个由四个卷积层组成的小型网络E(·)，卷积核为4×4，步长为2×2（使用ReLU激活，通道数分别为16、32、64、128，权重使用高斯初始化，并与完整模型联合训练），将图像空间条件ci编码为特征空间条件向量cf，如下所示：

items.en: The conditioning vector 𝒄fsubscript𝒄f\bm{c}_{\text{f}} is passed into the ControlNet.
items.zh: 条件向量cf被传入ControlNet。

items.en: Given an input image 𝒛0subscript𝒛0\bm{z}_{0}, image diffusion algorithms progressively add noise to the image and produce a noisy image 𝒛tsubscript𝒛𝑡\bm{z}_{t}, where t𝑡t represents the number of times noise is added. Given a set of conditions including time step 𝒕𝒕\bm{t}, text prompts 𝒄tsubscript𝒄𝑡\bm{c}_{t}, as well as a task-specific condition 𝒄fsubscript𝒄f\bm{c}_{\text{f}}, image diffusion algorithms learn a network ϵθsubscriptitalic-ϵ𝜃\epsilon_{\theta} to predict the noise added to the noisy image 𝒛tsubscript𝒛𝑡\bm{z}_{t} with
items.zh: 给定输入图像z0，图像扩散算法逐步向图像添加噪声，生成噪声图像zt，其中t表示添加噪声的次数。给定一组条件，包括时间步t、文本提示ct以及任务特定条件cf，图像扩散算法学习一个网络εθ来预测添加到噪声图像zt上的噪声，使用：

items.en: where ℒℒ\mathcal{L} is the overall learning objective of the entire diffusion model. This learning objective is directly used in finetuning diffusion models with ControlNet.
items.zh: 其中L是整个扩散模型的整体学习目标。这个学习目标直接用于使用ControlNet微调扩散模型。

items.en: In the training process, we randomly replace 50% text prompts 𝒄tsubscript𝒄𝑡\bm{c}_{t} with empty strings. This approach increases ControlNet’s ability to directly recognize semantics in the input conditioning images (e.g., edges, poses, depth, etc.) as a replacement for the prompt.
items.zh: 在训练过程中，我们随机将50%的文本提示ct替换为空字符串。这种方法提高了ControlNet直接识别输入条件图像（例如，边缘、姿态、深度等）中语义的能力，作为提示的替代。

items.capEn: Figure 4: The sudden convergence phenomenon. Due to the zero convolutions, ControlNet always predicts high-quality images during the entire training. At a certain step in the training process (e.g., the 6133 steps marked in bold), the model suddenly learns to follow the input condition.
items.capZh: 图4：突然收敛现象。由于零卷积，ControlNet在整个训练过程中始终预测高质量图像。在训练过程的某个步骤（例如，粗体标记的6133步），模型突然学会遵循输入条件。

items.capEn: Figure 5: Effect of Classifier-Free Guidance (CFG) and the proposed CFG Resolution Weighting (CFG-RW).
items.capZh: 图5：无分类器引导（CFG）和提出的CFG分辨率加权（CFG-RW）的效果。

items.capEn: Figure 6: Composition of multiple conditions. We present the application to use depth and pose simultaneously.
items.capZh: 图6：多个条件的组合。我们展示了同时使用深度和姿态的应用。

items.en: During the training process, since zero convolutions do not add noise to the network, the model should always be able to predict high-quality images. We observe that the model does not gradually learn the control conditions but abruptly succeeds in following the input conditioning image; usually in less than 10K optimization steps. As shown in Figure 4, we call this the “sudden convergence phenomenon”.
items.zh: 在训练过程中，由于零卷积不会向网络添加噪声，模型应该始终能够预测高质量图像。我们观察到，模型并不是逐渐学习控制条件，而是突然成功遵循输入条件图像；通常在不到10K优化步骤内。如图4所示，我们称之为“突然收敛现象”。

items.capEn: Figure 7: Controlling Stable Diffusion with various conditions without prompts. The top row is input conditions, while all other rows are outputs. We use the empty string as input prompts. All models are trained with general-domain data. The model has to recognize semantic contents in the input condition images to generate images.
items.capZh: 图7：使用各种条件控制Stable Diffusion，无需提示。第一行是输入条件，其他所有行是输出。我们使用空字符串作为输入提示。所有模型都使用通用域数据训练。模型必须识别输入条件图像中的语义内容才能生成图像。

items.en: We can further control how the extra conditions of ControlNet affect the denoising diffusion process in several ways.
items.zh: 我们可以通过几种方式进一步控制ControlNet的额外条件如何影响去噪扩散过程。

items.en: Classifier-free guidance resolution weighting. Stable Diffusion depends on a technique called Classifier-Free Guidance (CFG) [29] to generate high-quality images. CFG is formulated as ϵprd=ϵuc+βcfg​(ϵc−ϵuc)subscriptitalic-ϵprdsubscriptitalic-ϵucsubscript𝛽cfgsubscriptitalic-ϵcsubscriptitalic-ϵuc\epsilon_{\text{prd}}=\epsilon_{\text{uc}}+\beta_{\text{cfg}}(\epsilon_{\text{c}}-\epsilon_{\text{uc}}) where ϵprdsubscriptitalic-ϵprd\epsilon_{\text{prd}}, ϵucsubscriptitalic-ϵuc\epsilon_{\text{uc}}, ϵcsubscriptitalic-ϵc\epsilon_{\text{c}}, βcfgsubscript𝛽cfg\beta_{\text{cfg}} are the model’s final output, unconditional output, conditional output, and a user-specified weight respectively. When a conditioning image is added via ControlNet, it can be added to both ϵucsubscriptitalic-ϵuc\epsilon_{\text{uc}} and ϵcsubscriptitalic-ϵc\epsilon_{\text{c}}, or only to the ϵcsubscriptitalic-ϵc\epsilon_{\text{c}}. In challenging cases, e.g., when no prompts are given, adding it to both ϵucsubscriptitalic-ϵuc\epsilon_{\text{uc}} and ϵcsubscriptitalic-ϵc\epsilon_{\text{c}} will completely remove CFG guidance (Figure 5b); using only ϵcsubscriptitalic-ϵc\epsilon_{\text{c}} will make the guidance very strong (Figure 5c). Our solution is to first add the conditioning image to ϵcsubscriptitalic-ϵc\epsilon_{\text{c}} and then multiply a weight wisubscript𝑤𝑖w_{i} to each connection between Stable Diffusion and ControlNet according to the resolution of each block wi=64/hisubscript𝑤𝑖64subscriptℎ𝑖w_{i}=64/h_{i}, where hisubscriptℎ𝑖h_{i} is the size of ithsuperscript𝑖thi^{\text{th}} block, e.g., h1=8,h2=16,…,h13=64formulae-sequencesubscriptℎ18formulae-sequencesubscriptℎ216…subscriptℎ1364h_{1}=8,h_{2}=16,...,h_{13}=64. By reducing the CFG guidance strength , we can achieve the result shown in Figure 5d, and we call this CFG Resolution Weighting.
items.zh: 无分类器引导分辨率加权。Stable Diffusion依赖于一种称为无分类器引导（CFG）[29]的技术来生成高质量图像。CFG公式化为εprd = εuc + βcfg(εc - εuc)，其中εprd、εuc、εc、βcfg分别是模型的最终输出、无条件输出、条件输出和用户指定的权重。当通过ControlNet添加条件图像时，可以将其添加到εuc和εc，或仅添加到εc。在具有挑战性的情况下，例如没有给出提示时，将其同时添加到εuc和εc将完全消除CFG引导（图5b）；仅使用εc会使引导非常强（图5c）。我们的解决方案是首先将条件图像添加到εc，然后根据每个块的分辨率将权重wi乘以Stable Diffusion和ControlNet之间的每个连接，wi = 64/hi，其中hi是第i个块的大小，例如h1=8, h2=16, ..., h13=64。通过降低CFG引导强度，我们可以得到图5d所示的结果，我们称之为CFG分辨率加权。

items.en: Composing multiple ControlNets. To apply multiple conditioning images (e.g., Canny edges, and pose) to a single instance of Stable Diffusion, we can directly add the outputs of the corresponding ControlNets to the Stable Diffusion model (Figure 6). No extra weighting or linear interpolation is necessary for such composition.
items.zh: 组合多个 ControlNet。为了将多个条件图像（例如，Canny 边缘和姿态）应用于单个 Stable Diffusion 实例，我们可以直接将相应 ControlNet 的输出相加到 Stable Diffusion 模型中（图 6）。这种组合不需要额外的加权或线性插值。

items.capEn: Figure 8: Ablative study of different architectures on a sketch condition and different prompt settings. For each setting, we show a random batch of 6 samples without cherry-picking. Images are at 512 ×\times 512 and best viewed when zoomed in. The green “conv” blocks on the left are standard convolution layers initialized with Gaussian weights.
items.capZh: 图 8：不同架构在草图条件和不同提示设置下的消融研究。对于每种设置，我们展示随机一批 6 个样本，未经挑选。图像大小为 512×512，建议放大查看。左侧绿色的“conv”块是使用高斯权重初始化的标准卷积层。

items.en: We implement ControlNets with Stable Diffusion to test various conditions, including Canny Edge [11], Depth Map [69], Normal Map [87], M-LSD lines [24], HED soft edge [91], ADE20K segmentation [96], Openpose [12], and user sketches. See also the supplementary material for examples of each conditioning along with detailed training and inference parameters.
items.zh: 我们使用 Stable Diffusion 实现 ControlNet，以测试各种条件，包括 Canny 边缘 [11]、深度图 [69]、法线图 [87]、M-LSD 线条 [24]、HED 软边缘 [91]、ADE20K 分割 [96]、Openpose [12] 和用户草图。每种条件的示例以及详细的训练和推理参数见补充材料。

items.capEn: Figure 9: Comparison to previous methods.We present the qualitative comparisons to PITI [89], Sketch-Guided Diffusion [88], and Taming Transformers [19].
items.capZh: 图 9：与先前方法的比较。我们展示了与 PITI [89]、Sketch-Guided Diffusion [88] 和 Taming Transformers [19] 的定性比较。

items.en: We study alternative structures of ControlNets by (1) replacing the zero convolutions with standard convolution layers initialized with Gaussian weights, and (2) replacing each block’s trainable copy with one single convolution layer, which we call ControlNet-lite. See also the supplementary material for the full details of these ablative structures.
items.zh: 我们研究了 ControlNet 的替代结构，方法包括：(1) 将零卷积替换为使用高斯权重初始化的标准卷积层；(2) 将每个块的可训练副本替换为单个卷积层，我们称之为 ControlNet-lite。这些消融结构的完整细节见补充材料。

items.en: We present 4 prompt settings to test with possible behaviors of real-world users: (1) no prompt; (2) insufficient prompts that do not fully cover objects in conditioning images, e.g., the default prompt of this paper “a high-quality, detailed, and professional image”; (3) conflicting prompts that change the semantics of conditioning images; (4) perfect prompts that describe necessary content semantics, e.g., “a nice house”. Figure 8a shows that ControlNet succeeds in all 4 settings. The lightweight ControlNet-lite (Figure 8c) is not strong enough to interpret the conditioning images and fails in the insufficient and no prompt conditions. When zero convolutions are replaced, the performance of ControlNet drops to about the same as ControlNet-lite, indicating that the pretrained backbone of the trainable copy is destroyed during finetuning (Figure 8b).
items.zh: 我们提出了 4 种提示设置，以测试真实世界用户可能的行为：(1) 无提示；(2) 提示不足，未完全覆盖条件图像中的对象，例如本文的默认提示“高质量、详细且专业的图像”；(3) 冲突提示，改变条件图像的语义；(4) 完美提示，描述必要的内容语义，例如“一座漂亮的房子”。图 8a 显示 ControlNet 在所有 4 种设置下均成功。轻量级 ControlNet-lite（图 8c）不足以解释条件图像，在提示不足和无提示条件下失败。当零卷积被替换时，ControlNet 的性能下降到与 ControlNet-lite 大致相同，表明可训练副本的预训练主干在微调过程中被破坏（图 8b）。

items.en: User study. We sample 20 unseen hand-drawn sketches, and then assign each sketch to 5 methods: PITI [89]’s sketch model, Sketch-Guided Diffusion (SGD) [88] with default edge-guidance scale (β=1.6𝛽1.6\beta=1.6), SGD [88] with relatively high edge-guidance scale (β=3.2𝛽3.2\beta=3.2), the aforementioned ControlNet-lite, and ControlNet. We invited 12 users to rank these 20 groups of 5 results individually in terms of “the quality of displayed images” and “the fidelity to the sketch”. In this way, we obtain 100 rankings for result quality and 100 for condition fidelity. We use the Average Human Ranking (AHR) as a preference metric where users rank each result on a scale of 1 to 5 (lower is worse). The average rankings are shown in Table 1.
items.zh: 用户研究。我们采样了 20 个未见的手绘草图，然后将每个草图分配给 5 种方法：PITI [89] 的草图模型、Sketch-Guided Diffusion (SGD) [88] 使用默认边缘引导尺度 (β=1.6)、SGD [88] 使用相对较高的边缘引导尺度 (β=3.2)、前述的 ControlNet-lite 和 ControlNet。我们邀请了 12 名用户根据“显示图像的质量”和“对草图的保真度”分别对这 20 组 5 个结果进行排名。通过这种方式，我们获得了 100 个结果质量排名和 100 个条件保真度排名。我们使用平均人类排名 (AHR) 作为偏好指标，用户对每个结果按 1 到 5 的等级进行排名（越低越差）。平均排名如表 1 所示。

items.en: Comparison to industrial models. Stable Diffusion V2 Depth-to-Image (SDv2-D2I) [83] is trained with a large-scale NVIDIA A100 cluster, thousands of GPU hours, and more than 12M training images. We train a ControlNet for the SD V2 with the same depth conditioning but only use 200k training samples, one single NVIDIA RTX 3090Ti, and 5 days of training. We use 100 images generated by each SDv2-D2I and ControlNet to teach 12 users to distinguish the two methods. Afterwards, we generate 200 images and ask the users to tell which model generated each image. The average precision of the users is 0.52±0.17plus-or-minus0.520.170.52\pm 0.17, indicating that the two method yields almost indistinguishable results.
items.zh: 与工业模型的比较。Stable Diffusion V2 Depth-to-Image (SDv2-D2I) [83] 使用大规模 NVIDIA A100 集群、数千 GPU 小时和超过 1200 万张训练图像进行训练。我们为 SD V2 训练了一个 ControlNet，使用相同的深度条件，但仅使用 20 万训练样本、单个 NVIDIA RTX 3090Ti 和 5 天训练。我们使用 SDv2-D2I 和 ControlNet 各自生成的 100 张图像来教导 12 名用户区分这两种方法。之后，我们生成 200 张图像，并要求用户判断每张图像由哪个模型生成。用户的平均准确率为 0.52±0.17，表明两种方法产生的结果几乎无法区分。

items.en: Condition reconstruction and FID score. We use the test set of ADE20K [96] to evaluate the conditioning fidelity. The state-of-the-art segmentation method OneFormer [35] achieves an Intersection-over-Union (IoU) with 0.58 on the ground-truth set. We use different methods to generate images with ADE20K segmentations and then apply OneFormer to detect the segmentations again to compute the reconstructed IoUs (Table 2). Besides, we use Frechet Inception Distance (FID) [28] to measure the distribution distance over randomly generated 512×\times512 image sets using different segmentation-conditioned methods, as well as text-image CLIP scores [66] and CLIP aesthetic score [79] in Table 3. See also the supplementary material for detailed settings.
items.zh: 条件重建和 FID 分数。我们使用 ADE20K [96] 的测试集来评估条件保真度。最先进的分割方法 OneFormer [35] 在真实集上实现了 0.58 的交并比 (IoU)。我们使用不同方法生成带有 ADE20K 分割的图像，然后再次应用 OneFormer 检测分割以计算重建的 IoU（表 2）。此外，我们使用 Frechet Inception Distance (FID) [28] 测量随机生成的 512×512 图像集在不同分割条件方法下的分布距离，以及文本-图像 CLIP 分数 [66] 和 CLIP 美学分数 [79]（表 3）。详细设置见补充材料。

items.capEn: Figure 10: The influence of different training dataset sizes. See also the supplementary material for extended examples.
items.capZh: 图 10：不同训练数据集大小的影响。扩展示例见补充材料。

items.capEn: Figure 11: Interpreting contents. If the input is ambiguous and the user does not mention object contents in prompts, the results look like the model tries to interpret input shapes.
items.capZh: 图 11：解释内容。如果输入模糊且用户未在提示中提及对象内容，结果看起来像是模型试图解释输入形状。

items.capEn: Figure 12: Transfer pretrained ControlNets to community models [16, 61] without training the neural networks again.
items.capZh: 图 12：将预训练的 ControlNet 迁移到社区模型 [16, 61]，无需重新训练神经网络。

items.en: Influence of training dataset sizes. We demonstrate the robustness of the ControlNet training in Figure 10. The training does not collapse with limited 1k images, and allows the model to generate a recognizable lion. The learning is scalable when more data is provided.
items.zh: 训练数据集大小的影响。我们在图 10 中展示了 ControlNet 训练的鲁棒性。训练在仅有 1k 图像时不会崩溃，并允许模型生成可识别的狮子。当提供更多数据时，学习是可扩展的。

items.en: Capability to interpret contents. We showcase ControlNet’s capability to capture the semantics from input conditioning images in Figure 11.
items.zh: 解释内容的能力。我们在图 11 中展示了 ControlNet 从输入条件图像中捕获语义的能力。

items.en: Transferring to community models. Since ControlNets do not change the network topology of pretrained SD models, it can be directly applied to various models in the stable diffusion community, such as Comic Diffusion [61] and Protogen 3.4 [16], in Figure 12.
items.zh: 迁移到社区模型。由于 ControlNet 不改变预训练 SD 模型的网络拓扑，因此可以直接应用于稳定扩散社区的各种模型，例如 Comic Diffusion [61] 和 Protogen 3.4 [16]，如图 12 所示。

items.en: ControlNet is a neural network structure that learns conditional control for large pretrained text-to-image diffusion models. It reuses the large-scale pretrained layers of source models to build a deep and strong encoder to learn specific conditions. The original model and trainable copy are connected via “zero convolution” layers that eliminate harmful noise during training. Extensive experiments verify that ControlNet can effectively control Stable Diffusion with single or multiple conditions, with or without prompts. Results on diverse conditioning datasets show that the ControlNet structure is likely to be applicable to a wider range of conditions, and facilitate relevant applications.
items.zh: ControlNet 是一种神经网络结构，用于学习大型预训练文本到图像扩散模型的条件控制。它重用源模型的大规模预训练层来构建深度且强大的编码器，以学习特定条件。原始模型和可训练副本通过“零卷积”层连接，这些层在训练过程中消除了有害噪声。大量实验验证了 ControlNet 可以有效地控制 Stable Diffusion，支持单个或多个条件，无论是否有提示。在多样化条件数据集上的结果表明，ControlNet 结构可能适用于更广泛的条件，并促进相关应用。

items.en: This work was partially supported by the Stanford Institute for Human-Centered AI and the Brown Institute for Media Innovation.
items.zh: 这项工作部分得到了斯坦福大学以人为中心的人工智能研究所和布朗媒体创新研究所的支持。
